goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'cheap' price range and should serve 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should go to 'ely' and should 'arrive by 17:15'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'departure time', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should serve italian food
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on tuesday
The train should go to ely and should arrive by 17:15
Make sure you get price, departure time, and travel time
